# Speisely — Catering Services & Event Planners in Germany

Speisely is a Germany-wide marketplace connecting local restaurants, caterers, and event planners with diners and corporate organizers. Discover top-rated catering services in Germany, find professional event planners in Germany, and order food in Germany — including in major hubs like Munich, Berlin, Hamburg, Frankfurt, Cologne, Stuttgart, Düsseldorf, Leipzig, Nuremberg, and Dresden.

Speisely ist ein deutschlandweiter Marktplatz für Restaurants, Catering und Eventplanung. Finde erstklassige Catering-Services in Deutschland, Eventplaner in Deutschland und bestelle Essen in Deutschland — auch in Städten wie München, Berlin, Hamburg, Frankfurt, Köln, Stuttgart, Düsseldorf, Leipzig, Nürnberg und Dresden.

Main URL: https://speisely.de
Sitemap: https://speisely.de/sitemap.xml
Full Documentation for LLMs: https://speisely.de/llms-full.txt

## Key Core Modules

- **Catering Services in Germany / Catering-Services in Deutschland (`/catering`)**: Solutions for private event catering, daily office catering subscriptions, and institutional food services. Optimized for major cities (Catering in Munich / München, Berlin, Hamburg, Frankfurt, Cologne / Köln, Stuttgart, Düsseldorf, Leipzig, Nuremberg / Nürnberg, Dresden).
- **Event Planner in Germany / Eventplaner in Deutschland (`/planner`)**: A step-by-step assistant for corporate and private event planning, allowing organizers to configure event briefs, seat capacity, menus, and budgets.
- **Order Food in Germany / Essen in Deutschland bestellen (`/instant-order`)**: Real-time food ordering and menu browsing for local restaurants. Diners can order for pickup or delivery and pay via Cash, PayPal, or Stripe.
- **Partner Dashboard (`/restaurant`, `/caterer`, `/planner`)**: Dashboards for vendors to configure menus, handle orders, manage reservations, run promotions, and connect Stripe Connect / PayPal payment settings.

## System Architecture & Tech Stack

- **Framework**: TanStack Start (React, Vite, TanStack Router)
- **Database / Auth**: Supabase (PostgreSQL, Supabase Auth)
- **Payment Processor**: Stripe (Stripe Connect for connected accounts) & PayPal (direct PayPal.Me/Email)
- **Email Delivery**: Resend
- **Analytics & Logs**: PostHog, Vercel Analytics, Sentry
